title: coordinator.py: DataUpdateCoordinator with daily cache + recompute on options change
acceptance_criteria: DataUpdateCoordinator subclass with update_interval set so full simulation runs max once/day
_async_update_data calls statistics.py fetch, simulator.py sim, finance.py calc and caches combined result
Recompute triggered immediately on config entry options update (via config entry update listener), bypassing daily interval
Async executor-job wrapping for any CPU-bound numpy/pandas work to avoid blocking event loop
Errors from underlying calls surfaced via UpdateFailed with clear message
